description_long: This is a large, modern house set on a landscaped rectangular plot with a mix of manicured lawns, paved driveways, and decorative trees. The house features a flat roof design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, large windows, and a prominent garage structure. A swimming pool and patio area are visible at the rear, adjacent to a secondary building or pool house. The property is bordered by a combination of white and brown trees, with a driveway leading to the main entrance and garage. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with some dark roofing and glass elements. The overall layout is open and spacious, emphasizing clean lines and contemporary architectural style.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with expansive windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped plot with decorative trees and paved driveways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and manicured lawn with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway curve, garage, and the start of the backyard with visible pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and extensive windows along the back of the house.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, driveway entrance, and the landscaped perimeter with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist modern door adjacent to the garage
